scripts.build:standalone:all: npm run build:standalone && npm run build:standalone:generator && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.copyFileSync('standalone/index.html','safeseed-demo.html');fs.copyFileSync('standalone-generator/generator.html','safeseed-generator.html');console.log('updated committed single-files: safeseed-demo.html, safeseed-generator.html')"
